title: Roadmap nang cap theo phase
qualityGates: Push-Location workers/messenger; npm test; npm run build; Pop-Location

phases.name: Thiet lap roadmap dong
phases.goal: Co mot bang dieu khien theo doi ke hoach, cong viec, test va trang thai cap nhat tu script.

tasks.title: Tao state file cho roadmap
tasks.analysis: Can tach du lieu roadmap khoi HTML de co the cap nhat bang script sau moi cong viec.
tasks.implementation: Tao docs/upgrade-roadmap-state.json lam nguon trang thai.

tasks.note: Da tao state file cho roadmap dong

tasks.title: Tao HTML roadmap tuong tac
tasks.analysis: Nguoi dung can xem phase, task, lien ket file va tien do trong trinh duyet.
tasks.implementation: Tao docs/upgrade-roadmap.html voi filter, search, progress, task detail va diagram.
tests: Kiem tra DOM render bang static inspection

evidence.note: Da tao HTML roadmap tuong tac

tasks.title: Tao script cap nhat trang thai roadmap
tasks.analysis: Browser tinh khong the ghi file truc tiep. Can CLI cap nhat JSON va embed lai vao HTML.
tasks.implementation: Tao scripts/update-roadmap-status.mjs va npm script roadmap:update.

Da xac minh script va HTML dong bo dung

phases.name: Production hardening
phases.goal: Dong cac rui ro bao mat, thanh toan va deploy truoc khi them tinh nang lon.

tasks.title: Sua payment retry sau khi bi tu choi
tasks.analysis: Payment document hien dung ID co dinh theo invoice va uid. Khi bi rejected, viewer co the khong tao lai duoc report moi.
tasks.implementation: Cho phep multi-attempt hoac whitelist update tu rejected ve reported voi ownership check chat.
tests: Them Firestore Rules test cho rejected -> reported

evidence.note: Bat dau Phase 1: sua payment retry sau khi bi tu choi
Da cho phep viewer bao lai payment rejected cua chinh minh va khoa reportedBy theo uid

tasks.note: Da cho phep viewer bao lai payment rejected cua chinh minh va khoa reportedBy theo uid

tasks.title: Gioi han quyen Teacher theo lop phu trach
tasks.analysis: isStaff() hien cho Teacher quyen rong tren nhieu collection. ClassDoc da co teacherIds nen co the scope theo lop.
tasks.implementation: Them isAssignedTeacher(classId), tach Admin va Teacher trong rules va service query.
tests: Rules test Teacher doc lop minh
Rules test Teacher bi chan voi lop khac

evidence.note: Bat dau gioi han quyen Teacher theo lop phu trach
Da siết class-scoped collections theo classes.teacherIds; con gap students scope can data model classIds/teacherIds
Tiep tuc gap data model: them students.teacherIds de scope Teacher tren hoc sinh
Siet Teacher scope theo classId va students.teacherIds; khoa Teacher khong tu mo rong teacherIds/studentIds
evidence.test: lint PASS; typecheck PASS; unit 16/16 PASS; test:rules 80/80 PASS; build PASS

tasks.note: Siet Teacher scope theo classId va students.teacherIds; khoa Teacher khong tu mo rong teacherIds/studentIds

tasks.title: Khoa immutable fields trong Firestore Rules
tasks.analysis: Nhieu update rule chi check status, chua khoa cac field nhu studentId, classId, amount, createdBy.
tasks.implementation: Dung diff().affectedKeys().hasOnly(...) va validate schema cho tung collection.

evidence.note: Bat dau khoa immutable fields trong Firestore Rules
Da khoa immutable fields cho identity/scope/audit trong Firestore Rules va giu createdBy goc khi sua diem
evidence.test: lint PASS; typecheck PASS; unit 16/16 PASS; test:rules 86/86 PASS; build PASS

tasks.note: Da khoa immutable fields cho identity/scope/audit trong Firestore Rules va giu createdBy goc khi sua diem

tasks.title: Chot worker production deploy config
tasks.analysis: Wrangler canh bao deploy chua chi ro env, production origin van la placeholder.
tasks.implementation: Them script build:prod/deploy:prod voi --env production va cap nhat ALLOWED_ORIGIN that.

evidence.note: Tam thoi bo qua P1-004 theo yeu cau, chuyen sang Phase 2

tasks.note: Tam thoi bo qua P1-004 theo yeu cau, chuyen sang Phase 2

phases.name: UX foundation va code hygiene
phases.goal: Lam UI de doc, de scan va giam no ky thuat truoc khi mo rong workflow.

tasks.title: Sua tieng Viet va encoding bi mojibake
tasks.analysis: Mot so source/doc dang hien thi chuoi loi mojibake trong UI va tai lieu.
tasks.implementation: Chuan hoa UTF-8, sua copy hien thi, them check grep trong review.

evidence.note: Bat dau Phase 2: sua tieng Viet va encoding mojibake
Da sua/loai bo chuoi mojibake con lai va them npm run check:mojibake
evidence.test: check:mojibake PASS; lint PASS; typecheck PASS; build PASS

tasks.note: Da sua/loai bo chuoi mojibake con lai va them npm run check:mojibake

tasks.analysis: Nhieu page con inline form/button/state nen kho giu consistency.

evidence.note: Bat dau chuan hoa Button/IconButton va PageHeader actions
Da them Button/IconButton va chuan hoa CTA trong PageHeader/ErrorState

tasks.title: Giam chunk size production
tasks.analysis: Build canh bao index chunk hon 1 MB minified.
tasks.implementation: Cau hinh manualChunks cho Firebase, Recharts va vendor, audit import chart.

evidence.note: Bat dau giam chunk size production
Da cau hinh manualChunks tren vite.config.js (config Vite thuc te) va dong bo vite.config.ts; tach React, Firebase, Recharts, date, UI vendor ra khoi entry
evidence.test: lint PASS; typecheck PASS; check:mojibake PASS; build PASS; index 1011.06 kB -> 14.99 kB; Firestore chunk con 568.20 kB (>500) can lazy-load/Firestore Lite neu muon het warning

tasks.note: Da cau hinh manualChunks tren vite.config.js (config Vite thuc te) va dong bo vite.config.ts; tach React, Firebase, Recharts, date, UI vendor ra khoi entry

phases.name: Data surfaces va workflow theo role
phases.goal: Hoan thien cac workflow quan trong cho Admin, Teacher va Viewer.

tasks.title: Toi uu dashboard staff bang summary
tasks.analysis: Staff dashboard hien gom nhieu query va N+1 attendance theo session.
tasks.implementation: Tao materialized daily summary hoac query giam doc read.

evidence.note: Bat dau Phase 3: audit Staff Dashboard va giam query/read budget
Da toi uu Staff Dashboard: dung attendance_summaries thay vi doc tung attendance, dung getCountFromServer cho pending invoices
evidence.test: lint PASS; typecheck PASS; check:mojibake PASS; unit 16/16 PASS; build PASS; test:rules BLOCKED port 8090 dang bi chiem

tasks.note: Da toi uu Staff Dashboard: dung attendance_summaries thay vi doc tung attendance, dung getCountFromServer cho pending invoices

tasks.title: Hoan thien audit log UI
tasks.analysis: He thong da ghi audit_logs nhung chua co man hinh doc va loc.
tasks.implementation: Them trang Admin audit log voi filter actor/action/date va pagination.

tasks.title: Import du lieu hoc sinh/lop tu CSV
tasks.analysis: Nhap tay tung hoc sinh/lop se cham khi trung tam co du lieu lon.
tasks.implementation: Them import preview, validate, dry-run va batch write.

phases.name: Tich hop va tu dong hoa
phases.goal: Giam thao tac thu cong va tao kenh giao tiep co kiem soat.

tasks.title: Thong bao va Messenger campaign
tasks.analysis: Worker da co send/post/webhook, can UI va audit cho chien dich thong bao.
tasks.implementation: Them templates, recipient preview, rate limit va outbox monitor.

tasks.title: Backup/export va runbook van hanh
tasks.analysis: Runbook co canh bao backup thu cong, can quy trinh ro truoc thay doi du lieu lon.
tasks.implementation: Them export scripts cho emulator/test data va checklist truoc release.

phases.name: Release gate va CI
phases.goal: Moi thay doi phai co test gate, preview va cap nhat roadmap truoc khi coi la xong.

tasks.title: Cau hinh CI cho lint typecheck test build
tasks.analysis: Kiem tra dang chay thu cong, can bat buoc tren PR.
tasks.implementation: Them GitHub Actions cho app, rules tests va worker.
